tasks.subject: Task 19: tests/test_no_unredacted_writes.py — CI invariant gate (USER-GATE)
tasks.description:
USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.

Goal: AST-based scan of src/kinoforge/ enforcing 7 ACs (put_json canonical, put_bytes opaque, OutputSink registers basename, _save_fixture is_active check, cli installs filter, ArtifactStores implement delete_run+cleanup, no rogue path writes).

Files: tests/test_no_unredacted_writes.py (new).

tasks.subject: Task 20: E2E integration tests — proof points (USER-GATE)
